ThemeDefault.description: Default theme of the skin. Valid values are 'light', 'dark' and 'auto'.

ThemeColor.description: The theme color defined in the meta tag

EnableManifest.description: Enable or disable web app manifest

GlobalToolsPortlet.description: ID of the portlet to attach the global tools

EnableCollapsibleSections.description: Enables or disable collapsible sections on content pages

EnableDrawerSiteStats.description: Enables the site statistics in drawer menu

EnableCJKFonts.description: Enable included Noto Sans CJK for wikis that serves CJK languages

EnableHEFonts.description: Enable included Noto Sans Hebrew for wikis that serve Hebrew

EnableARFonts.description: Enable included Noto Naskh Arabic for wikis that serve Arabic

OverflowInheritedClasses.description: Defines css classes inherited by overflow wrapper

OverflowNowrapClasses.description: Defines css classes ignored by overflow wrapper

TableOfContentsCollapseAtCount.description: @var The minimum number of headings required to collapse all headings in the sticky table of contents by default.

EnableShare.description: Enable or disable the share button

ShareMode.description: Which share UI to present. 'auto' (default): try the browser's Web Share API first and fall back to Wiki7's panel when unavailable. 'panel': always use Wiki7's panel. 'native': always use the Web Share API, with a clipboard fallback on unsupported browsers.

HeaderPosition.description: Position of the header on the desktop layout. Possible values: 'left', 'right', 'top' and 'bottom'

DrawerFooterLinks.description: Array of footer link objects for the drawer menu. Each object has: label, href, icon (Codex icon name), external (bool).

UseNewToken.description: Opt-in switch for the new color token pipeline. Set to true to enable. Defaults to false through the current major Wiki7 release so existing wikis aren't visually shifted without explicit consent; the new pipeline becomes the default — and legacy is removed — in the next major release.
